hypothesis: If a model is pre-trained on MOF-related literature and PubChem data and then fine-tuned on MOFid-to-property tasks, it will achieve lower MAE on MOF property predictions than the CGCNN, SOAP, and MOFormer baselines, with the improvement most pronounced when fine-tuning data are scarce because pre-training provides domain-specific knowledge and chemical-property mappings that transfer to MOF prediction.
